//: Owner-controlled catalogue of connectable downstreams (SPEC-container-runtime §13.7.3). The registry says what is CONNECTABLE; the mandate sizes WHO may touch it. A tool is exposed to the caged agent iff the mandate carries its scope. Downstream credentials live HERE (with the gateway), never in the cage.

servers.//: Example of a first-party HTTP connector holding its own credential (env-injected by the gateway). Grant with scope mcp.mail (whole server) or a per-verb tool_scopes map.
